subject: A hooded humanoid figure rising from a broken wooden coffin or sarcophagus, holding an ornate staff or weapon with a large gem, red glowing eyes under the hood
description: A hooded figure bursts upward from the ruins of what appears to be a wooden coffin or carved box, boards splintered around the figure's lower body. The figure extends one arm forward holding an ornate scepter or weapon topped with a large red gem. The hood casts the face in shadow except for two glowing red points where the eyes would be. Small moths or spirit fragments scatter through the air around the figure, lit by a pale haze behind them. The background shows rough-hewn stone walls or ruined masonry. The palette is warm ochre and brown with stark light from above and behind. The posture is forceful and upward-moving — an emergence from death.
foreground: Hooded figure rising from shattered coffin, holding scepter with red gem
background: Ruined stone walls, pale hazy light from above, scattered moths or dust motes
emotion: menacing, forceful — resurrection as aggressive emergence
